description: Verify conversational rule elicitation, rule proposal scope inference, human confirmation, and scoped rule application.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" rule-elicit --context 'We are preparing production legal and writing workflows with evidence requirements.' --limit 3 > "$tmp/elicit.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["conversation_prompts"]; assert data["next_action"].startswith("rule-suggest")' "$tmp/elicit.json"; "$office" rule-suggest --title 'Global approval before customer send' --body 'All agents must stop for human judgment before sending anything to a customer or publishing externally.' --source conversation --created-by u1 --role project_manager --proposal-id global-send-rule > "$tmp/global-proposal.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "pending_user_confirmation"; assert data["proposed_scope"] == "global"; assert data["requires_user_confirmation"] is True' "$tmp/global-proposal.json"; "$office" rule-proposal-decision --proposal-id global-send-rule --decision approve --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --decided-by admin1 --role enterprise_admin --confirmed > "$tmp/global-apply.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys,pathlib; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["rule_proposal"]["status"] == "applied"; path=pathlib.Path(sys.argv[2]) / data["rule_proposal"]["applied_rule_path"]; assert path.exists(); assert "rules/global" in data["rule_proposal"]["applied_rule_path"]' "$tmp/global-apply.json" "$tmp/agent-system"; "$office" rule-suggest --title 'Writer evidence tone' --body 'The writer Agent should cite source material before turning research into final prose.' --agent writer --source conversation --created-by u1 --role project_manager --proposal-id writer-evidence-rule > "$tmp/agent-proposal.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["proposed_scope"] == "agent"; assert data["agent_id"] == "writer"' "$tmp/agent-proposal.json"; "$office" rule-proposal-decision --proposal-id writer-evidence-rule --decision approve --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --decided-by admin1 --role enterprise_admin --agent writer --confirmed > "$tmp/agent-apply.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys,pathlib; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["rule_proposal"]["status"] == "applied"; path=pathlib.Path(sys.argv[2]) / data["rule_proposal"]["applied_rule_path"]; assert path.exists(); assert data["rule_proposal"]["applied_rule_path"] == "rules/agents/writer.md"' "$tmp/agent-apply.json" "$tmp/agent-system"
